docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $437.00 FILED BY HOLMES LAVELLE AS TO DEFENDANT ATKINS CAROLL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLMES LAVELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATKINS CAROLL $932.04 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $940.04, 591 MONTEREY BLVD #3 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
